steps.title: Find the length of the rectangle
steps.content: The length is 50 centimeters longer than the width. Since the width is 9 cm, the length is $$9 + 50 = 59 \text{ cm}$$

steps.title: Calculate the area
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is width times length: $$A = 9 \times 59 = 531 \text{ square centimeters}$$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
